message:
fix(scan): Fix docker-compose extractor quote handling for embedded commands

The docker-compose extractor was using trim_matches which strips all
occurrences of quotes from both ends of a string. This broke commands
with internal quotes (like sh -c with a quoted argument) where only
the trailing quote was stripped, producing a malformed command that
couldn't be properly scanned by the heredoc AST scanner.

Fixed by only stripping quotes when they form a matching pair at both
ends of the value.

Also adds comprehensive integration tests for all scan mode extractors:
- Dockerfile, Makefile, GitHub Actions, GitLab CI
- Docker Compose, package.json, Terraform
- Tests for both positive detection and false positive avoidance

Related bead: git_safety_guard-l9ig

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
